learnings.text: Airtable checkbox fields have parenthetical suffixes like 'Salary Range (Checkbox)' - use exact field names from SCHEMA_TO_ADD.md in Integrations/careerspan-pipeline/

When integrating Zo app tools (Airtable, Google Drive, Gmail), scripts should output instructions/logs for the tools rather than directly calling them. The orchestrator can then execute these tool calls. This decouples the skill from app tool implementation details.
The decomposer was outputting flat array but schema expected wrapped object - code and schema must be designed together
Field naming inconsistencies (name vs skill_name, level_required vs required_level) should be caught by validation tests earlier
Making schema fields nullable allows graceful migration of legacy data
